message:
fix(bulkhead): track max individual wait time instead of cumulative for timeout metrics

Fixes the max_queue_wait_ms_atomic metric to track the maximum
individual wait time among timed-out entries, rather than the cumulative
wait time of all timed-out entries in a single sweep. Previously, if 10
entries each waited 100ms, the metric would report 1000ms instead of
100ms. Now correctly computes per-entry wait and uses the maximum.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
